# Detool.AI

> AI-powered growth studio: high-converting websites, AI lead follow-up automation, outreach, and paid traffic that books appointments for service businesses.

## Pages

- [Home](/): What Detool.AI does — websites, AI automation, outreach, and paid traffic that close leads.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Plans and pricing for Detool.AI services.
- [Contact](/contact): Book a free meeting with Detool.AI.
- [Help Center](/help): Answers to common questions about Detool.AI.
- [Documentation](/documentation): Guides for using Detool.AI.
- [Marketing Templates](/marketing): Marketing assets and templates.
- [Phone Script](/phone-script): Sales phone script resource.
- [Privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy.
